subcodes.first_line: O Fatimah! Cling to the Word, and be thou detached and free from aught else beside it. Today the lights of the Orb of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فاطمه بکلمه تمسک نما و از دونش فارغ و آزاد باش امروز انوار نیر توحید
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Word of God is its own standard
